name: Tunisian Five Spices (Qalat Daqqa)
recipeInstructions:
1. Called qalat daqqa in Arabic, this blend is used in vegetable dishes and with lamb.
2. Grind the peppercorns, cloves, and grains of paradise together.
3. Mix in the nutmeg and cinnamon.
4. Store the blend in an airtight jar for 3-4 months.
